subcodes.first_line: The Book which the Wronged One hath revealed unto them that have attained unto the lights of My Name, the Self-Subsisting, and have witnessed that which God did witness before creation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله المظلوم لمن فاز بانوار اسمی القیوم و شهد بما شهد الله قبل خلق
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @consolation and comfort, @soul; spirit after death, @exhortations and counsels
